description: Close the remaining parity gaps between redis-vl-dotnet and the broader RedisVL Java and Python ecosystems while preserving a .NET-native async-first API.

userStories.title: Refresh the parity matrix and roadmap docs
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the repository parity docs updated to reflect the current Java and Python gap analysis so that implementation work is guided by the new roadmap instead of the completed v1 baseline.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update a parity matrix document that compares current .NET, Java, and Python capabilities
Mark each identified gap as required, deferred, or out of scope for the parity roadmap
Document intentional .NET-native API differences that remain after parity work
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add multiple prefix support to index metadata

Generate valid FT.CREATE arguments for multiple prefixes
Add unit tests covering single-prefix and multi-prefix schema construction
Add integration tests proving index creation succeeds with multiple prefixes
Add or update an example that creates an index with multiple prefixes

Tests pass
